signals: NVIDIA acelera el ciclo de hardware con Rubin y proyecta un mercado global de $10 billones impulsado por IA.
Google profundiza la IA personal integrando Gemini en Sheets y automatizando flujos en Gmail y Fotos.
El ecosistema se mueve hacia la estandarización de métricas AGI y marcos de comportamiento ético de modelos.
Musk propone infraestructura orbital para superar los límites terrestres de energía y espacio en centros de datos.
DeepMind prioriza la expansión científica y educativa en mercados emergentes estratégicos como la India.
risks: Inestabilidad geopolítica crítica que amenaza rutas logísticas de semiconductores en el Estrecho de Ormuz.
Límites físicos en tierra (energía/suelo) forzando arquitecturas espaciales experimentales de altísimo riesgo.
Capacidades de manipulación sistémica en modelos IA afectando sectores sensibles como salud y finanzas.
watch: Benchmarks de rendimiento real de la arquitectura NVIDIA Rubin tras su anuncio en el CES 2026.
Adopción de la API de voz de baja latencia de Grok en aplicaciones de telefonía y agentes en vivo.
Evolución del marco de medición AGI de DeepMind y su adopción por parte de otros laboratorios líderes.

items.title: Musk’s Orbital Compute Vision: TERAFAB and the End of the Terrestrial Data Center
items.summary: At the TERAFAB launch event in Austin on March 21, Elon Musk made a prediction that would have sounded like science fiction a decade ago—and may still: roughly 80 percent of AI compute will eventually move off-planet. The argument is straightforward once you accept his premises. Earth-based data centers face three hard constraints—land,… Read More The post Musk’s Orbital Compute Vision: TERAFAB and the End of the Terrestrial Data Center appeared first on SemiWiki .
items.why: Musk propone mover el 80% del cómputo al espacio para evadir límites de energía terrestres; visión disruptiva pero altamente especulativa.

items.title: Announcing Terafab: the next step towards becoming a galactic civilization Grok's Text to Speech API is now available in LiveKit Inference. Natural, expressi...
items.summary: Announcing Terafab: the next step towards becoming a galactic civilization Grok's Text to Speech API is now available in LiveKit Inference. Natural, expressive voices with low-latency streaming. Multilingual in 20+ languages. Telephony and production-ready out of the box. One API key. No extra setup. → [docs.livekit.io/agents/models/](https://t.co/LCX4zfQTg8) Quote xAI @xai Mar 16 Grok's Text to Speech API is now available. Start building with natural voices and expressive controls to bring your apps to life. x.ai/api/voice#text
items.why: Grok lanza API de voz multilingüe para producción con baja latencia, compitiendo directamente en el sector de agentes de voz.

items.title: Over the past 27 days, the U.S. armed forces, most powerful in the world, have been annihilating Iran's military capacity with force, precision,skill like th...
items.summary: Over the past 27 days, the U.S. armed forces, most powerful in the world, have been annihilating Iran's military capacity with force, precision,skill like the world has never seen. : "We're negotiating now, and it would be great if we could do something, but they have to open it up. They have to open up the Strait of Trump—I mean Hormuz. Excuse me, I'm so sorry. Such a terrible mistake." ![Image 10: 🤣](https://abs-0.twimg.com/emoji/v2/svg/1f923.svg)
items.why: Tensiones militares en el Estrecho de Ormuz amenazan la logística global y el suministro energético necesario para semiconductores.

items.title: Accelerating discovery in India through AI-powered science and education
items.summary: Google DeepMind brings National Partnerships for AI initiative to India, scaling AI for science and education
items.why: DeepMind expande su influencia regional en India mediante alianzas para acelerar la investigación científica asistida por IA.

items.title: Bringing the power of Personal Intelligence to more people
items.summary: Bubble that says "Personal Intelligence" with Google G, Google Photos logo, and Gmail logo around it
items.why: Integración de IA personal en Gmail y Fotos para mejorar la utilidad diaria del usuario final dentro del ecosistema Google.

items.title: Watch Jensen Huang unveil the latest breakthroughs in AI and accelerated computing, and more in the [#NVIDIAGTC](https://x.com/hashtag/NVIDIAGTC?src=hashtag_...
items.summary: Watch Jensen Huang unveil the latest breakthroughs in AI and accelerated computing, and more in the [#NVIDIAGTC](https://x.com/hashtag/NVIDIAGTC?src=hashtag_click) 2026 keynote. Now live ![Image 4: ⬇️](https://abs-0.twimg.com/emoji/v2/svg/2b07.svg)
items.why: La presentación de NVIDIA GTC 2026 marca el ritmo de la industria en computación acelerada e infraestructura de próxima generación.

items.title: Measuring progress toward AGI: A cognitive framework
items.summary: We’re introducing a framework to measure progress toward AGI, and launching a Kaggle hackathon to build the relevant evaluations.
items.why: DeepMind introduce un marco cognitivo para medir formalmente el progreso hacia la AGI, buscando estandarizar el sector.

items.title: NVIDIA Rubin Platform, Open Models, Autonomous Driving: NVIDIA Presents Blueprint for the Future at CES
items.summary: NVIDIA founder and CEO Jensen Huang took the stage at the Fontainebleau Las Vegas to open CES 2026, declaring that AI is scaling into every domain and every device. “Computing has been fundamentally reshaped as a result of accelerated computing, as a result of artificial intelligence,” Huang said. “What that means is some $10 trillion […]
items.why: NVIDIA anuncia la plataforma Rubin y proyecta un mercado de $10 billones, consolidando su hegemonía en hardware de IA.

items.title: Gemini in Google Sheets just achieved state-of-the-art performance.
items.summary: Today we announced new beta features for Gemini in Sheets to help you create, organize and edit entire sheets, from basic tasks to complex data analysis — just describe …
items.why: Gemini logra rendimiento SOTA en Google Sheets, automatizando análisis de datos complejos directamente en aplicaciones de oficina.

items.title: The more AI can do, the more we need to ask what it should and shouldn’t do. OpenAI researcher joins host to explore the Model Spec, the public framework tha...
items.summary: The more AI can do, the more we need to ask what it should and shouldn’t do. OpenAI researcher joins host to explore the Model Spec, the public framework that defines how models are intended to behave. They break down how it works in practice, from the chain
items.why: OpenAI publica su Model Spec para definir comportamientos deseados y límites éticos de sus futuros modelos.

items.title: We invited Claude users to share how they use AI, what they dream it could make possible, and what they fear it might do. Nearly 81,000 people responded in o...
items.summary: We invited Claude users to share how they use AI, what they dream it could make possible, and what they fear it might do. Nearly 81,000 people responded in one week—the largest qualitative study of its kind. Read more:
items.why: Estudio cualitativo masivo de Anthropic sobre percepciones y riesgos percibidos por 81,000 usuarios de Claude.

items.title: Protecting people from harmful manipulation
items.summary: Google DeepMind researches AI's harmful manipulation risks across areas like finance and health, leading to new safety measures.
items.why: Investigación sobre riesgos de manipulación conductual mediante IA en finanzas y salud, impulsando nuevas medidas de seguridad.

items.title: Lyria 3 Pro: Create longer tracks in more Google products
items.summary: Sizzle video showing new capabilities from Lyria 3 Pro
items.why: Lanzamiento de Lyria 3 Pro para generación de audio de larga duración, fortaleciendo la oferta creativa de Google.

items.title: It’s the Humidity: How International Researchers in Poland, Deep Learning and NVIDIA GPUs Could Change the Forecast
items.summary: For more than a century, meteorologists have chased storms with chalkboards, equations, and now, supercomputers. But for all the progress, they still stumble over one deceptively simple ingredient: water vapor. Humidity is the invisible fuel for thunderstorms, flash floods, and hurricanes. It’s the difference between a passing sprinkle and a summer downpour that sends you […]
items.why: Aplicación de hardware NVIDIA y deep learning para resolver problemas complejos de humedad en predicción meteorológica.

items.title: A Gaming GPU Helps Crack the Code on a Thousand-Year Cultural Conversation
items.summary: Ceramics — the humble mix of earth, fire and artistry — have been part of a global conversation for millennia. From Tang Dynasty trade routes to Renaissance palaces, from museum vitrines to high-stakes auction floors, they’ve carried culture across borders, evolving into status symbols, commodities and pieces of contested history. Their value has been shaped […]
items.why: Uso de GPUs de consumo para análisis histórico de cerámicas; impacto limitado fuera del ámbito académico especializado.
